Title: Verify the App Can Be Installed on an Android Device
Test Steps:
1. Download the Barattopoly app from the Google Play Store.
2. Install the app on an Android device.
Expected Result: The app should install successfully without errors.

Title: Verify the App Launches Successfully
Preconditions: The app is installed on an Android device.
Test Steps: 1. Open the Barattopoly app.
Expected Result: The app should launch without crashing and display the initial screen.

Title: Verify the App Allows User Registration
Preconditions: The app is installed and launched on an Android device.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration screen.
2. Enter valid user credentials.
3. Submit the registration form.
Expected Result: The user should be registered successfully and redirected to the login screen.

Title: Verify the App Allows User Login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login screen.
2. Enter valid user credentials.
3. Submit the login form.
Expected Result: The user should log in successfully and be redirected to the main dashboard.

Title: Verify the App Allows Posting Announcements
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement posting screen.
2. Fill out the announcement form with valid details.
3. Submit the announcement.
Expected Result: The announcement should be posted successfully and visible in the user’s profile.

Title: Verify the App Allows Viewing Announcements
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement viewing screen.
2. Browse through the list of announcements.
Expected Result: The user should be able to view all posted announcements without issues.

Title: Verify the App Allows Searching for Announcements
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the search function.
2. Enter search keywords.
3. Initiate the search.
Expected Result: The app should return relevant announcements based on the search criteria.

Title: Verify the App Allows Proposing Trades
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the trade proposal screen.
2. Select an announcement to propose a trade.
3. Fill out the trade proposal form with valid details.
4. Submit the trade proposal.
Expected Result: The trade proposal should be sent successfully and visible in the user’s profile.

Title: Verify the App Allows Accepting or Rejecting Trade Proposals
Preconditions: The user is logged in and has received a trade proposal.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the trade management screen.
2. Review the trade proposals.
3. Accept or reject a trade proposal.
Expected Result: The selected trade proposal should be updated accordingly in the user’s profile.

Title: Verify the App Allows Modifying Personal Data
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile management screen.
2. Update personal data fields.
3. Save the changes.
Expected Result:
The user’s personal data should be updated successfully in the profile.
---------------------------
END OF TEST CASES

PROJECT SUMMARY:
----------------
Barattopoly is an Android application designed to improve life within a neighborhood, especially for vulnerable groups such as elderly people, children, adolescents, and recent immigrants. The app aims to facilitate the bartering of goods and services among residents, promoting community interaction and reducing waste through the redistribution of perishable items like food. Users can publish announcements of items and services they wish to trade or give away for free. The application is intended to be accessible and usable across various devices running the Android operating system.
---------------------------

Title: User Registration
Preconditions: The application is installed on the device and the user has a personal email.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application for the first time.
2. The application allows the user to enter personal data.
3. After confirming the validity of the entered data, the system adds the new user to the database.
Expected Result: The user is added to the database and can access the application.

Title: User Login
Preconditions: The user has a valid account.
Test Steps:
1. Start the application.
2. The application requests the user's login credentials.
3. The system checks the validity of the data and, if correct, grants access to the application for the user.
Expected Result: The user's data is retrieved from the database and made available for viewing and interaction.

Title: View Personal Board
Preconditions: The user is authenticated to the application.
Test Steps:
1. The user moves to the personal board screen.
2. The system displays an intuitive list of objects/services previously published by the user.
Expected Result: The elements of the user's board are displayed.

Title: Publish New Items in Personal Board
Preconditions: The user is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. The user clicks the button to create a new item/service.
2. The user fills out the form with the details of the item they want to publish.
3. The system verifies the correctness of the entered data and, if correct, inserts it into the database.
Expected Result: The user sees the new item/service in their board along with other previously inserted items.

Title: Explore Offers
Preconditions: User is registered and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application.
2. Tap the icon dedicated to viewing offers from other users.
3. Apply filters to search for specific offers.
Expected Result: The system displays offers from other users based on the applied filters.

Title: Propose Exchange
Preconditions: User is registered, logged in, and within another user's offer. If the item is not free, the user proposing the exchange must have at least one other item or service available in their personal board.
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application.
2. Navigate to another user's offer.
3. Tap the button to propose an exchange.
4. Select an item or service from your personal board to exchange.
Expected Result: The system sends a trade request to the other user.

Title: View Proposals and Their Status
Preconditions: User has at least one active exchange proposal.
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application.
2. Move to the screen displaying active exchange proposals.
3. Review the list of active proposals in chronological order.
4. View details of the exchanges and their status.
Expected Result: The system retrieves and displays the relevant data regarding the user's active exchange proposals.

Title: Accept or Reject Proposals
Preconditions: User is logged in and has items in their personal board. There is a proposal from another user.
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application.
2. Receive a notification about a received proposal for an item in your personal board.
3. View the proposal of exchange.
4. Tap the appropriate icon to accept or reject the proposal.
Expected Result: The offerer receives a notification about the outcome of the proposal made.

Title: Apply Filters for Search
Preconditions: User is registered and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application.
2. Tap the icon to view offers from other users.
3. Tap the filter icon to open a menu with a series of applicable filters.
4. Apply filters based on location, type of item (physical or service), and purpose (charity or trade).
Expected Result: The results returned by the app are more relevant to the user's expectations.

Title: Remove Object from Personal Board and Database

2. Access the personal board.
3. Select an object to remove.
4. Perform the action to remove the object (e.g., tap a delete button).
Expected Result:
The object is removed from the personal board and the database.
